'''yayuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyanophyll|kyanophyll]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-y-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyanophyll|kyanophyll]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yayuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæyihith|yæyihith]] || [[word:yæyihij|yæyihij]] || [[word:yæyihish|yæyihish]] || [[word:yæyihi|yæyihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yayuyuhuth|yayuyuhuth]] || [[word:yayuyuhuj|yayuyuhuj]] || [[word:yayuyuhush|yayuyuhush]] || [[word:yayuyuhu|yayuyuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yayuhuth|yayuhuth]] || [[word:yayuhuj|yayuhuj]] || [[word:yayuhush|yayuhush]] || [[word:yayuhu|yayuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yayufhuth|yayufhuth]] || [[word:yayufhuj|yayufhuj]] || [[word:yayufhush|yayufhush]] || [[word:yayufhuf|yayufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yayuhuthu|yayuhuthu]] || [[word:yayuhuju|yayuhuju]] || [[word:yayuhushu|yayuhushu]] || [[word:yayuhuku|yayuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yayuhuth|yayuhuth]] || [[word:yayuhuj|yayuhuj]] || [[word:yayuhush|yayuhush]] || [[word:yayuhu|yayuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yayuhuthul|yayuhuthul]] || [[word:yayuhujul|yayuhujul]] || [[word:yayuhushul|yayuhushul]] || [[word:yayuhukul|yayuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yayuhuthuthu|yayuhuthuthu]] || [[word:yayuhujuju|yayuhujuju]] || [[word:yayuhushushu|yayuhushushu]] || [[word:yayuhuku|yayuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yayuhuthun|yayuhuthun]] || [[word:yayuhujun|yayuhujun]] || [[word:yayuhushun|yayuhushun]] || [[word:yayuhukun|yayuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yayuhuthuoro|yayuhuthuoro]] || [[word:yayuhujuoro|yayuhujuoro]] || [[word:yayuhushuoro|yayuhushuoro]] || [[word:yayuhukuoro|yayuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
